case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. SAMUEL MILLAN VEGA

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO JUN-29-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-17-2018 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION RE: RESET OF TRIAL DATE FOR NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT VEGA, SAMUEL MILLAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-17-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT VEGA, SAMUEL MILLAN CLAIM HEARING OF JUN-29-2018 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 2/16/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
